parameters.query: SELECT category_id, category_name FROM catalogs.categories WHERE marketplace = $1 AND is_active = true AND (name_ro IS NULL OR name_ro_translated_at IS NULL OR name_ro_translated_at < last_synced_at) ORDER BY category_id LIMIT $2::INTEGER;
UPDATE catalogs.categories SET name_ro = $2, name_ro_source = 'gemini', name_ro_translated_at = NOW() WHERE marketplace = $1 AND category_id = $3 AND ($2 IS NOT NULL);
